summary: Draft PR with no diff or changed-file metadata in the slice. The PR body records match-attempt status: 5 claimed 100% matches in ftKb_SpecialN.c, 7 failed functions, and 1 pending toy.c function. The bot report complicates the claim by reporting an overall matched-code decrease, 2 new matches in ftKb_SpecialN, 62 broken matches, several near-improvements in ftKb_SpecialNNs, and one unmatched-item regression.

key_files.role: PR body claims five 100% matched Kirby SpecialN animation functions; bot report also lists two new matches and many broken matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.

what_changed.text: No changed files or diff hunks are available in the loaded slice; raw diff is empty and metadata reports changed_files=0.
PR body claims five 100% matches in ftKb_SpecialN.c: ftKb_SpecialNSpit_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirNSpit_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNDrink0_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNDrink1_Anim, and ftKb_SpecialNDrink_Anim.
PR body lists seven failed attempts with scores or failure counts: grPura_80212FC0, grOnett_801E5194, pl_80038628, fn_8021E994, grCastle_801CE19C, InitNameEntryUIState, and grOnett_801E40E4.
PR body lists toy.c / un_80307828 as pending.
Bot report says matched code decreased to 58.98% by -0.20% / -7728 bytes, with 2 new matches, 62 broken matches, 6 unmatched-item improvements, and 1 unmatched-item regression.

smart_moves.text: The PR body separated matched, failed, and pending functions with concrete scores/statuses, making later triage searchable even without a diff.
The bot report provided blast-radius evidence across matched, broken, improved, and regressed items, which is important because the PR body's matched-function list alone does not show regressions.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not rely on a PR body's local matched-function list as proof of safe progress; compare it against automated regression output when available.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: matched code -0.20%, 62 broken matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large blast-radius reports in a single unit should be treated as unresolved evidence, not as accepted matches, unless the diff and verification details explain the tradeoff.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: ftKb_SpecialN has 2 new matches but many broken matches and one regression

naming_conventions.text: Observed Kirby function names use the ftKb prefix and action-state style suffixes such as SpecialN, SpecialAirN, Drink, Spit, Eat, IASA, Anim, Coll, and Enter.
Unrecovered or uncertain symbols remain address-style or fn_/un_ names in the PR evidence, such as fn_8021E994, fn_800F64C8, and un_80307828.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: No concrete source tactic, assembly tactic, pragma, local-variable steering, or data-section edit is visible because the slice contains no diff.
The evidence supports only score/report triage: compare claimed 100% matches against GALE01 bot output and inspect broken adjacent functions before treating the attempt as reviewable.

review_feedback.text: GALE01 report shows matched code decreased by 0.20% / 7728 bytes despite 2 new matches.
Report lists 62 broken matches, mainly in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN, plus one regression in fn_800F98F4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: 📉 1 regression in an unmatched item

accepted_candidate_records.title: Regression report can outweigh local matched-function claims during intake
accepted_candidate_records.text: For PR intake, preserve automated regression evidence when it contradicts or complicates a PR body's matched-function list. In PR #2333, the body lists 5 matched functions, while the bot report shows an overall matched-code decrease and many broken matches.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: matched code -0.20%, 62 broken matches

source_update_candidates.title: Require regression report reconciliation for score-only match PRs
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding guidance that score-only or generated progress PRs should not be summarized as successful matches unless their PR-body match claims are reconciled with bot/checkdiff regression output.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: 2 new matches, 62 broken matches, 1 regression
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR slice shows a recurring curation hazard: a compact match-progress table can omit broad automated regressions.

rejection_notes: Do not promote any of the five PR-body 100% matches as accepted project facts; no diff or local objdiff evidence is included.
Do not infer implementation tactics, code style, or authored source shape from this slice because the raw diff is empty.
Do not infer reviewer intent or merge acceptance; no human review comments are present and merged_at is null.
Do not create path facts for toy.c or failed symbols beyond their appearance in the PR body.
